case_title: GREENHUT,RICHARD DBA THE GREAT VENDINI VENDING CO. VS AMERICAN ARS CORP.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GREENHUT,RICHARD DBA THE GREAT VENDINI VENDING CO. AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN ARS CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN ARS CORP.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GREENHUT,RICHARD DBA THE GREAT VENDINI VENDING CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN ARS CORP. $1,950.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,996.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN ARS CORP.
